name: oidc-scope-applications
summary: OIDC 'applications' scope exposing portal menu in userinfo
description: Adds an 'applications' scope that returns the user's portal application list in the OIDC userinfo response. Allows OIDC clients to display the same application menu as the LemonLDAP::NG portal.
author: Xavier Guimard <yadd@debian.org>
